scripts.preinstall: node -e "try{require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json')}catch(e){}; try{require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock')}catch(e){}; const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);} "
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/autopro777" --filter "./artifacts/api-server" --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
